mapper.select: select cip, first_name, last_name, email, profile_picture_url from ebock.user_ where cip = #{cip}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ebock.user_ (cip, first_name, last_name, email, is_admin, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{cip}, #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{email}, false, true, now(), now());
mapper.update: UPDATE ebock.user_ SET first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, email = #{email}, updated_at = now() WHERE cip = #{cip}
